seo.title: Field notes on AI adoption · frameworks, funding intel, EU AI Act
seo.description: The AI Literacy Compliance Playbook, frameworks we actually use with clients, and a curated list of vendor credits, free tiers and on-prem models. Updated for 2026.
seo.keywords: AI adoption resources, AI Literacy Compliance Playbook, EU AI Act Article 4 guide, AI funding intelligence, AI adoption frameworks, vendor AI credits, on-prem AI models, Romania, EU

hero.title: Useful material for teams working through AI, funding, execution, and change.
hero.subtitle: The AI Literacy Compliance Playbook, upcoming events where we show up, and a curated list of credits, free tiers and open-source tools that make AI cheap to start with.

playbook.body: How to solve the EU AI Act Article 4 mandate. A practical guide to AI Literacy training for your employees, written for HR, L&D, Operations and exec teams in SMEs.
bullets: Why Article 4 already applies to your team today
The "Shadow AI" risk and how to surface it
A 4-step rollout plan for AI Literacy
How to turn compliance into a competitive advantage

events.subtitle: Public events, talks and roundtables on AI adoption, EU AI Act compliance, and funding intelligence. No webinars-for-leads.
events.emptyState: No public events scheduled right now. Book an AI Adoption Call instead.

items.name: Lovable Founder Series
items.context: Founder talk on AI adoption inside non-tech teams. Registration opens soon.

cheapAi.subtitle: Vendor perks, free tiers and on-prem options that let teams adopt AI without paying full price — and without sending sensitive data to a US chatbot. Updated for 2026.

groups.title: Vendor credits
groups.blurb: Sign up as a startup or SME and get cloud + AI credits worth thousands.

items.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
items.what: Up to $150k in Azure + OpenAI credits, no equity required.

items.name: Google for Startups Cloud Program
items.what: Up to $200k in Google Cloud + Gemini credits over 2 years.

items.name: AWS Activate
items.what: Up to $100k in AWS credits, including Bedrock model access.

items.name: Anthropic for Startups
items.what: Claude API credits and priority access for early-stage teams.

groups.title: Free tiers & domain agents
groups.blurb: Real free tiers, not 14-day trials. Good enough for prototypes, pilots and small workloads.

items.name: Lovable AI Gateway
items.what: Free window on Gemini Flash. No key, no card.

items.name: Hermes Agent
items.what: Our domain agent for AI adoption questions. Free to try, no signup.

items.name: OpenClaw
items.what: Open-source agent framework for building your own domain assistants.

items.name: Mistral La Plateforme
items.what: Free API access to Mistral models for experimentation.

items.name: Together AI
items.what: Free credits on Llama, Qwen and other open models.

groups.ctaText: Talk to us about a free pilot →

groups.title: On-prem & local models · privacy first
groups.blurb: Companies need privacy, not a ChatGPT subscription. Run open models on your own hardware — zero data leaves the building.

items.name: Gemma (Google)
items.what: Open-weight family from Google. Runs locally on a single GPU, strong for SMB workloads.

items.name: Llama (Meta)
items.what: Flagship open-weight family. Strong general-purpose models, full self-host.

items.name: Mistral & Mixtral
items.what: European open models, efficient for European-language workloads.

items.name: Qwen
items.what: Top of the charts on multilingual tasks, fully open weights.

items.name: Whisper
items.what: Open-source speech-to-text. Runs locally, multilingual, no upload.

items.name: Ollama
items.what: Run open-source LLMs on your own server with one command.

items.name: LM Studio
items.what: Desktop app to run open models on a laptop or workstation, GUI included.

funding.body: EU structural funds, Horizon, recovery programmes, national digitalization grants — the landscape is dense, the rules shift every cycle, and most teams lose calls not because they don't qualify, but because nobody had the bandwidth to write the application before the deadline. We're building a dedicated practice around exactly this gap: continuously monitoring the calls that match your profile, scoring them by fit and effort, and producing structured drafts from your past work so your team refines instead of starting from a blank page.
funding.bodyTwo: It's the same logic as our AI work — remove the manual overhead, keep human judgment in the loop, and ship the things that were always supposed to be shipped. The full platform launches later in 2026. In the meantime, if your organization runs on grants and you want a private preview or a manual scan of what's open right now for your profile, we'll do it on a call.
funding.depthBody: The complete list of vendor credits, EU and national grants we work with — plus the operational engine behind every funding engagement — lives on the Funding page.
funding.note: Free · on a call · no platform signup required

cta.title: Start with the AI Adoption Call.
cta.subtitle: A free 30-minute call that scores your AI adoption maturity and gives you a ranked next-step roadmap. 1-page written summary within 24 hours.
